personality_voice.book_baseline: Rookwood appears only briefly in the books — referenced at his trial as a Ministry of Mysteries employee who ran an intelligence network for Voldemort. No direct dialogue or behavioral pattern is established in the corpus.
personality_voice.film_portrayal: Rookwood does not appear in the film corpus provided.
personality_voice.difference: The character is entirely absent from the films as represented in the corpus.
personality_voice.penalty_logic: A score of 0 is assigned not as a faithfulness judgment but because there is no film material to evaluate. The absence itself cannot be scored on a faithfulness scale.

narrative_role_agency.book_baseline: Rookwood's book role is as a named Death Eater identified as a spy who exploited his Ministry position to build an intelligence network. His narrative function is minimal but specific: he is evidence of Voldemort's infiltration of the Ministry.
narrative_role_agency.film_portrayal: No film appearance in the corpus.
narrative_role_agency.difference: His narrative function as a named Ministry-infiltrating Death Eater is entirely absent from the films as shown in the corpus.
narrative_role_agency.penalty_logic: No film material exists to score. Score is 0 by default due to complete absence.

motivations_internal_conflict.penalty_logic: Score is 0 due to absence of film material.

key_relationships.book_baseline: The only relational context in the corpus is Karkaroff naming him to Crouch, implying a relationship of informant/accused and a connection to Voldemort's network. No emotional dynamic is established.
key_relationships.penalty_logic: Score is 0 due to absence of film material.

This is a specific and interesting detail — Ministry infiltration at a structural level — but the corpus does not develop it into complexity or nuance.

lost_or_transferred_material: Rookwood's identity as a Department of Mysteries employee who ran a spy network inside the Ministry for Voldemort is not represented in the films.
score_caps_applied: No caps applied. Scores are 0 across all dimensions due to complete absence of film material, not due to cap enforcement.
comparative.key_observations: Augustus Rookwood does not appear in the provided film corpus at all. The book corpus itself is extremely limited — two scenes establishing only his name, Ministry affiliation, and role as a Death Eater spy. Because there is no film portrayal to evaluate, a faithfulness score cannot be meaningfully assigned. All dimension scores are 0 by default, and all confidence levels are Low. This is not a judgment that the films portray him unfaithfully — it is a judgment that there is no film portrayal to evaluate.
